data.text/markdown:
Narrative layer

Semantic search + topic clustering over persisted post embeddings (paraphrase-multilingual-mpnet-base-v2, handles English / Swahili / Sheng). Run embed_new to cover the full corpus before reading topics - clusters sharpen with more data.

data.text/html: <marimo-ui-element object-id='vblA-0' random-id='43562207-eaff-1e50-bd0a-969c0c190207'><marimo-text data-initial-value='"IEBC cannot be trusted, the election will be rigged"' data-label='"\u003cspan class=\"markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"paragraph\"\u003eSemantic search\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e"' data-placeholder='""' data-kind='"text"' data-full-width='true' data-disabled='false' data-debounce='true'></marimo-text></marimo-ui-element>

<marimo-ui-element object-id='bkHC-0' random-id='ca5143b0-6fc5-b90e-9ef4-53b4aa37f497'><marimo-table data-initial-value='[]' data-label='null' data-data='"[{\"sim\":0.6726112365722656,\"author_handle\":\"Bill_Valar\",\"text\":\"In all things that I hate Kasongo is the number one thing that i do hate.\"},{\"sim\":0.6653022766113281,\"author_handle\":\"jonnysavage001\",\"text\":\"Why do you hate kasongo?\"},{\"sim\":0.5981648564338684,\"author_handle\":\"JimmyKipro254\",\"text\":\"@abbiezuena This one Ruto will surely boycott it. \\nHe knows he can't stand sifuna\"},{\"sim\":0.5623433589935303,\"author_handle\":\"eastersins\",\"text\":\"@C_NyaKundiH @Murangiri_KE I said it! ruto is worse than satan! #RutoMustGo\"},{\"sim\":0.5336065888404846,\"author_handle\":\"DenoVinci\",\"text\":\"@omwambaKE I loathe Kenya Kwanza regime\"},{\"sim\":0.5299968123435974,\"author_handle\":\"Mercynicky_\",\"text\":\"I am only awake because of my immense hate for Kasongo\"},{\"sim\":0.5180209875106812,\"author_handle\":\"FGaitho237\",\"text\":\"Ol Kalou Rejects Ruto\\u2019s Puppet: Billboards Torn Down as Residents Spit on the Regime\\n\\nOl Kalou residents have openly expressed their deep disgust with the government of British-backed war criminal and mass murderer William Ruto.\\n\\nHis handpicked candidate, Samuel Muchina, is facing a July by-election, but the people have already delivered their verdict - his campaign billboard was dramatically destroyed by angry protesters chanting \\u201cWantam\\u201d.\\n\\nThis is not just random vandalism. It is a clear, visceral rejection of everything Ruto represents. The residents of Ol Kalou are fed up with the looting, the killings, the economic suffocation, and the endless circus of regime puppets being paraded as \\u201cleaders.\\u201d\\n\\nNo amount of money, no amount of police protection, and no amount of propaganda can save these candidates when the people have decided enough is enough. \\n\\nThe destruction of Muchina\\u2019s billboard is a loud message: your time is up.\"},{\"sim\":0.5110198259353638,\"author_handle\":\"MedhaneMartins\",\"text\":\"Ruto doesn't deserve anymore time in the helm of power! \\n#RutoMustGo\"},{\"sim\":0.5098882913589478,\"author_handle\":\"Mothoni_\",\"text\":\"To go ruto! Ngl\\u2026. #rutoMUSTGO\"},{\"sim\":0.5097444653511047,\"author_handle\":\"ritchmutsi\",\"text\":\"@WilliamsMkenya That's your narrative Ruto is a WANTAM president you got to be sick in your head thinking he'll win The guy is hated even with kids.\"}]"' data-total-rows='12' data-total-columns='3' data-max-columns='50' data-banner-text='""' data-pagination='true' data-page-size='10' data-field-types='[["sim",["number","float32"]],["author_handle",["string","str"]],["text",["string","str"]]]' data-show-filters='true' data-show-download='true' data-show-search='true' data-show-column-summaries='true' data-show-data-types='true' data-show-page-size-selector='true' data-show-column-explorer='true' data-show-chart-builder='true' data-row-headers='[]' data-hidden-columns='[]' data-has-stable-row-id='false' data-lazy='false' data-preload='false'></marimo-table></marimo-ui-element>

<marimo-ui-element object-id='BYtC-0' random-id='521373b3-ad27-b944-8a23-cb6407b2d232'><marimo-table data-initial-value='[]' data-label='null' data-data='"[{\"stance\":\"supports\",\"stance_score\":0.9186503291130066,\"author_handle\":\"Belive_Kinuthia\",\"text\":\"In 2027 we will have the North Eastern region, the Coastal region, the Rift Valley region, the Luo Nyanza region and the Western region fielding a single presidential candidate.\\n\\nThat will be William Ruto.\"},{\"stance\":\"supports\",\"stance_score\":0.828464925289154,\"author_handle\":\"Kev_Muller\",\"text\":\"#RutoMustGo\\n#WANTAM\"},{\"stance\":\"opposes\",\"stance_score\":0.4607193171977997,\"author_handle\":\"MunyokiFredrick\",\"text\":\"@Ademba_47 Ruto will use violence to intimidate voters &amp; use IEBC to rig. \\nHe'll use violence to keep power: by unleashing combination of goons &amp; his k!ller squads police units. Time will pass &amp;  \\\"normalcy\\\" take time to resume. It'll be the beginning of the end of Kenya as we know it.\"},{\"stance\":\"supports\",\"stance_score\":0.5495535135269165,\"author_handle\":\"Patzigzagzig\",\"text\":\"Madingo waliingia CHAIWALI ,WAKAIBIA WATU ALAFU WALICHAI, GAVA YA KALENJIN WEZI TUPU #RUTOMUSTGO #WANTAM\"},{\"stance\":\"opposes\",\"stance_score\":0.635745644569397,\"author_handle\":\"wizipreps\",\"text\":\"Saccos have been the lifeblood of this country, enabling so many people to make something of themselves. Clearly Ruto and his acolytes want to impoverish everyone because what in the demonic hell is this malice aforethought? Wanataka kukula pesa ya Sacco? #RutoMustGo\"},{\"stance\":\"supports\",\"stance_score\":0.7867732644081116,\"author_handle\":\"MiruniHerbert\",\"text\":\"@rigathi Tragic! This is another very significant reason why Kenyans of good will should vote out Ruto &amp; render his juvenile &amp; incompetent CS for @InteriorKE Kipchumba Murkomen jobless.\"},{\"stance\":\"opposes\",\"stance_score\":0.8592543005943298,\"author_handle\":\"gwamaee\",\"text\":\"Hii goonism being facilitated by ministry of insecurity kitaturamba sisi wote, no one is safe kwa hotel, kwa jam, kwa biz mliona hata Kisii polisi wakiguard goons as they stoned Msafara ya Sifuna & unfortunately we lost a person\\ud83d\\ude22 RUTO anataka tukuwe Haiti na haitatambua Tutam ama wantam. The biggest service we will do to our country in 2027 is removing Ruto who is only concentrating na biashara zake, he only loves money \\ud83d\\ude22 \\n#SisiNdioSifuna #BaBuKwaSababu #RutoMustGo #TukoKadi #JusticeForOurMashujaa \\ud83c\\uddf0\\ud83c\\uddea\"},{\"stance\":\"opposes\",\"stance_score\":0.841517448425293,\"author_handle\":\"Maina790\",\"text\":\"@Dennis_Itumbi02 With the kind of insecurity, two things are likely to happen, \\n1. If you vite in 2027 itumbi you will not vote for ruto, he has totally failed this nation.\\n2. You might be killed by the goons and robbers you associate with\"},{\"stance\":\"supports\",\"stance_score\":0.7123392224311829,\"author_handle\":\"ninweynOG\",\"text\":\"@__abdi_ Watu wa dawa ya mende na panya ni washenzi sana. ..  but wajue ni tutam,  wapende wasipende..  Ruto hata anaenda  14 years bila break,\"},{\"stance\":\"neutral\",\"stance_score\":0.4719250500202179,\"author_handle\":\"Prof1one\",\"text\":\"Another malaya ya kasongo! #RutoMustGo\"}]"' data-total-rows='60' data-total-columns='4' data-max-columns='50' data-banner-text='""' data-pagination='true' data-page-size='10' data-field-types='[["stance",["string","str"]],["stance_score",["number","float64"]],["author_handle",["string","str"]],["text",["string","str"]]]' data-show-filters='true' data-show-download='true' data-show-search='true' data-show-column-summaries='true' data-show-data-types='true' data-show-page-size-selector='true' data-show-column-explorer='true' data-show-chart-builder='true' data-row-headers='[]' data-hidden-columns='[]' data-has-stable-row-id='false' data-lazy='false' data-preload='false'></marimo-table></marimo-ui-element>
